message:
feat(abi): promote services database family from host delegation to native

Replace 4 host-delegated symbols with native implementations:
- setservent/endservent/getservent — thread-local BufReader-backed
  /etc/services iterator using frankenlibc_core::resolv::parse_services_line
- getservent_r — reentrant variant packing servent struct into
  caller-supplied buffers

Host delegation count in unistd_abi.rs: 33 → 29

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
